cases.name: 複数エリアのチケットを順番に作成する

input.factory: () => ({ status: "OK", floor: "input", name: "root", areas: [{ floor: "2", name: "east", rooms: [201, 202] }, { floor: "3", name: "west", rooms: [301] }], createTicket: function (room, status) { return this.floor + "F-" + this.name + "-" + room + ":" + status; } })

cases.name: 空のroomsを持つエリアは飛ばす

input.factory: () => ({ status: "CHECK", floor: "input", name: "root", areas: [{ floor: "1", name: "lobby", rooms: [] }, { floor: "4", name: "north", rooms: [401, 402] }], createTicket: function (room, status) { return this.floor + "F-" + this.name + "-" + room + ":" + status; } })

cases.name: エリアごとにthisを切り替える

input.factory: () => ({ status: "NG", floor: "input", name: "root", areas: [{ floor: "B1", name: "storage", rooms: [12] }, { floor: "1", name: "front", rooms: [101] }, { floor: "10", name: "roof", rooms: [1001, 1002] }], createTicket: function (room, status) { return this.floor + "F-" + this.name + "-" + room + ":" + status; } })

cases.name: 全エリアのroomsが空なら空配列にする

input.factory: () => ({ status: "OK", floor: "input", name: "root", areas: [{ floor: "5", name: "south", rooms: [] }, { floor: "6", name: "center", rooms: [] }], createTicket: function (room, status) { return this.floor + "F-" + this.name + "-" + room + ":" + status; } })
